skills.description: Design specification for building CLI tools that AI agents can safely use, covering structured JSON output, error handling, input contracts, safety guardrails, exit codes, and agent self-description.
trigger_conditions: Building a new CLI tool that AI agents will invoke
Retrofitting an existing CLI to be agent-friendly
Designing command-line interfaces for automation pipelines
Auditing a CLI tool's compliance with agent-safety standards
anti_triggers: CLI tools without structured JSON output
CLIs that prompt for missing input interactively

skills.description: Validate SKILL.md files against the agentskills specification and Anthropic best practices, catching structural errors, semantic contradictions, naming anti-patterns, and quality gaps in a single read-only pass.
trigger_conditions: Use when user says 'check skill'
'skillcheck'
or 'validate SKILL.md'
Use when reviewing a skill before publishing to a marketplace
Use when debugging why a skill doesn't trigger correctly
Use when onboarding a team to skill authoring standards
anti_triggers: Do NOT use for anti-slop detection
or token analysis; use [SkillCheck Pro](https://getskillcheck.com) for those

skills.description: Automates the creation of new CLI skills following Anthropic's best practices with zero manual configuration, including brainstorming, template application, validation, and installation processes.
trigger_conditions: User wants to extend CLI functionality with custom capabilities
User needs to create a skill following official standards
User wants to automate repetitive CLI tasks with a reusable skill
User needs to package domain knowledge into a skill format
User wants both local and global skill installation options
anti_triggers: Creating skills without following Anthropic's best practices
Manually configuring each step of the skill creation process

skills.description: Iteratively improve a Claude Code skill using the skill-reviewer agent until it meets quality standards.
trigger_conditions: Improving a skill with multiple quality issues
Iterating on a new skill until it meets standards
Automated fix-review cycles instead of manual editing
Consistent quality enforcement across skills

skills.description: Scan agent skills for security issues before adoption. Detects prompt injection, malicious code, excessive permissions, secret exposure, and supply chain risks.
trigger_conditions: User provides a skill directory path
User names a specific skill to scan
User requests to scan all skills
anti_triggers: Running the scanner on arbitrary code without context

skills.description: Automatically convert documentation websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills in minutes.
trigger_conditions: Need to work with documentation websites
Want to convert GitHub repositories into AI skills
Looking to automatically convert PDFs into AI skills
anti_triggers: Working with sensitive data that requires strict privacy controls

skills.description: A comprehensive workflow for creating, improving and updating agent skills following the Agent Skills specification.
trigger_conditions: Asked to create or update skills
Skill improvement required based on outcomes/examples
anti_triggers: Purely theoretical tasks without practical implementation
